listings.name: Operator Prompt Pack v3
listings.description: 60 production-grade prompts across writing, code, automation, research. Tested across Claude, GPT, Gemini families.

listings.name: Termux Ops Kit
listings.description: Install scripts, aliases, ssh hardening, tmux config, Claude CLI proxy setup. Tested on Android 12+.

listings.name: Cloudflare Worker AI Proxy Kit
listings.description: Drop-in Worker for safe Claude/OpenAI integration. Origin allow-list, rate limit, secret env, full README.

listings.name: Static Site Launch Kit
listings.description: Drop-in HTML/CSS/JS template with Forge Atlas-grade theming. Cloudflare Pages config included.

listings.name: Landing Page Forge
listings.description: Five proven hero formats, three CTA stacks, social proof patterns, FAQ accordions, all editable.

listings.name: Agent Kit · Single-Operator
listings.description: Solo-operator agent loop: Strategist + Builder + Critic. Cloudflare Worker template, prompt scaffolds.

listings.name: Operator Dashboard Template
listings.description: Project-tracking dashboard for solo operators. Static-first, backend-ready data layer.

listings.name: AI Business Playbook
listings.description: 48-page playbook: niche selection, offer design, pricing, fulfillment, scaling. Operator-tested.

listings.name: Brand Identity Forge
listings.description: Logo, palette, typography, voice guide template. Includes Forge Atlas-style aesthetic kit.

listings.name: Operator UI Components
listings.description: Cards, hero patterns, navigation systems, glassmorphism kit. Plain HTML/CSS — no framework.

listings.name: Freelance Starter Pack
listings.description: Pricing calculator, intake form, scope template, contract starter. PDF + editable docs.

listings.name: Automation Blueprint Library
listings.description: 30 ready-to-deploy automation patterns: lead capture, content distribution, customer support, data cleanup.

listings.name: Claude Ops Starter Kit
listings.description: Get Claude working for your business in a weekend. Pre-built system prompts, task templates, and workflow patterns for operators just getting started.

listings.name: Multi-Agent Blueprint
listings.description: Architect and deploy multi-agent pipelines using Cloudflare Workers. Includes Swarm, Strategist-Builder-Critic loop, and handoff patterns.

listings.name: AI Site in a Weekend
listings.description: Complete blueprint for launching an AI-powered static site on Cloudflare Pages in 48 hours. Includes Workers setup, Pages Functions, and deploy automation.

listings.name: Prompt Audit Pack
listings.description: Diagnose and fix weak prompts fast. 20 audit frameworks, before/after rewrites, and a scoring rubric for any LLM.
